title: Redev
description: Adds removed, unused, mentioned, and exclusive content of Minecraft to Minecraft!
body:
![Redev Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa7d8e878bda21d427bde59221a87168bc1bc39.png)

__________________________________________________________________________

Redev is a vanilla-based mod that aims to expand on removed, unused, mentioned, and exclusive content from all versions of Minecraft to Minecraft! Items, blocks, mobs, and other concepts that should've, could've, and would've been added are reiterated and implemented in a renewed state!

This includes...
     Mob Votes!
     Biome Votes!
     Minecraft Dungeons!
     Minecraft Legends!
     Removed features!
     Unused features!
     Mentioned features!
     Suggested features!
     And more?

All additions can be found here! - [Redev Document](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1W2kI3VCJtw8zETobuDtGFhgSr2typ4rwA754w-RoGYo/edit?usp=sharing)
I've opened a discord server to cover developments & previews for Redev content!
https://discord.gg/jWN5cduHkT

Happy exploring!
